answers.text: 针对 Review Compressor (compressor-3) 参数缺失的问题，已生成候选编辑提案。该设备当前配置为出口压力控制模式且启用了防喘振审查，提案中为您添加了出口压力目标、最小流量旁路百分比以及效率基准的参数占位符，请在审查提案时填写具体的运行数值。

summary: 针对 compressor-3 缺失的控制目标与防喘振审查参数生成占位符候选提案。

issues.message: Review Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.
Review Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.
Review Compressor is missing efficiency percent input required for current review baseline.
